gate_reason: OOS CI [-0.149, -0.021] fully negative — edge is statistically confirmed absent in 2025-26; OOS verdict is NEGATIVE

improvements.title: Regime gating — size/enter by measured regime expectancy
improvements.trigger: regime cross-tab CI: non-BULL regimes show negative/uncertain expectancy
improvements.evidence: BULL_TRENDING mean_R≈0.179, other regimes mean_R≈N/A.  Edge status: NO EDGE
improvements.expected_impact: Eliminate non-BULL trades.  If non-BULL mean_R=N/A, removing them improves blended R.  CI of improvement requires a dedicated OOS split (not yet measured).
improvements.risk: Reduced trade frequency; BULL regime may lag signal (enter too late); morning_regime already provides partial coverage — measure its hit rate first.
improvements.action: 1. Confirm morning_regime WAIT/SELECTIVE hit rate on the OOS period.  2. If hit rate < 60%, tune the NIFTYBEES EMA50 + VIX thresholds.  3. Only then scale non-BULL positions to 0.5× (not zero — avoids over-concentration).

improvements.title: Confidence threshold raising — filter entries by score monotonicity
improvements.trigger: confidence bucket analysis is monotonic (higher conf → higher mean_R)
improvements.expected_impact: Not triggered — monotonicity not confirmed or improvement < 0.05 R.
improvements.risk: Reduced trade frequency; small bucket N inflates apparent mean_R; confidence is calculated on the entry path, not measured OOS.
improvements.action: Do not change confidence threshold — evidence insufficient.

improvements.title: HUB_SIGNAL strategy inclusion/exclusion decision
improvements.trigger: Hub un-shadowed OOS has statistically significant positive or negative mean_R
improvements.expected_impact: Not triggered — insufficient data or verdict uncertain.
improvements.risk: HUB_SIGNAL proxy ≠ real 7-factor score.  Excluding based on proxy may incorrectly penalize a strategy that works with real scores.  Real HUB_SIGNAL can only be validated on live paper-trade history (not backtest).
improvements.action: Gather more paper-trade data on HUB_SIGNAL before deciding.

improvements.title: Exit policy change — replace current T1-partial + trail with measured winner
improvements.trigger: An exit variant beats current by > 0.05 R with OOS CI excluding zero
improvements.evidence: Current exit mean_R=0.069.  Best alternative: partial_fixed mean_R=0.176 (Δ=+0.107 R).  Exit comparison runs on a sample (N≤100 symbols) — re-run on full universe before acting.
improvements.expected_impact: Switching to partial_fixed: Δ≈+0.107 R per trade in backtest.  OOS CI for this delta: not yet computed — requires a dedicated split.
improvements.risk: Exit policy comparison uses same entries — any entry-bias amplifies apparent exit gain.  Run on full universe (443 symbols) not sample before deciding.  Give-back and MFE metrics (Phase 1 data) are the ground truth for exit quality.
improvements.action: 1. Re-run exit comparison on full symbol set.  2. Check Phase 1 MFE/give-back by exit_reason in live paper trades.  3. If both confirm partial_fixed, switch via `exit_policy` config (no code change — gated by settings).

improvements.title: Position sizing — tie lot size to measured per-regime expectancy
improvements.trigger: Regime cross-tab shows σ(mean_R across regimes) > 0.15 R
improvements.evidence: Insufficient regime cross-tab data (N<30 per cell).
improvements.expected_impact: Scaling down non-BULL positions to 0.5× (reducing risk in lower-expectancy regimes) improves blended expectancy but reduces trade frequency and absolute PnL.  Quantitative impact requires a dedicated backtest with the sizing rule active.
improvements.risk: Regime mis-classification lags actual regime shifts (EMA50 is a slow signal).  Over-sizing in BULL only creates regime-concentrated drawdowns if BULL reversal is sharp.  Always maintain position-level stops regardless of sizing.
improvements.action: 1. Add a `regime_size_multiplier` config (default 1.0 — no change).  2. In run_agent_cycle() / _process_symbol(), multiply qty by multiplier based on    current morning_regime.  3. Re-run backtest with BULL=1.0, RANGE=0.5, BEAR=0.25.  4. Compare OOS expectancy (not just PnL) before enabling.

readiness_notes: Phase 2 gate not passed.  No capital tier is reached.
Current honest status: system is NOT ready for real capital at any tier.
Phase 1 + Phase 2 must close measurement and validation gaps first.
final_statement: Phase 3 gate NOT PASSED (OOS mean_R=-0.085, CI=[-0.149,-0.021]).  Triggered improvements: R4.  Recommended action order: R4 Exit policy change.  Capital readiness: NONE.  No optimization should be deployed until a dedicated OOS validation confirms improvement.
